SELECT value, toUInt16OrNull(value) FROM test_table_1 WHERE toUInt16OrNull(value) IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE test_table_2 (id UInt32, value String);
SELECT t2.id, toUInt16OrNull(t2.value) AS converted_value FROM test_table_2 AS t2 WHERE t2.value IN (SELECT value FROM test_table_1);
SELECT toUInt16OrNull(substring(value, 1, 2)) AS short_value FROM test_table_3 WHERE value LIKE '0%' OR value REGEXP '^[1-9][0-9]*$';
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT toUInt16OrNull(value) AS converted_value FROM test_table_1 GROUP BY converted_value HAVING converted_value IS NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE test_table_4 (x String, y String);
SELECT x, y, toUInt16OrNull(x) + toUInt16OrNull(y) AS total FROM test_table_4;
SELECT DISTINCT toUInt16OrNull(x) AS converted_x FROM test_table_4 WHERE toUInt16OrNull(x) IS NOT NULL UNION SELECT DISTINCT toUInt16OrNull(y) FROM test_table_4 WHERE toUInt16OrNull(y) IS NOT NULL;
